headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Wish I’d Bought Dell for My Charitable Trust a Hundred Points Ago”
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on as he discussed Big Tech’s AI spending. headline: Evercore ISI Says Cisco’s (CSCO) Silicon One is an Underappreciated Driver of Upside
summary: With a YTD Return of 21.04% as of May 7, Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy to Beat the S&P 500.
